examples: Skin is easily irritated, chapped, chafed, and sensitized.
"Yes, my little man," Slightly anxiously replied, who had chapped knuckles.
His hands are chapped by the cold.
While they were gone, I holed up with a boy I vaguely liked who had a very chapped lower lip.
It's so dry, all my lips and face are all chapped right now because the air has been so dry.
